## Inter-repo Checklist

- [ ] I referenced the active inter-repo context in `docs/runbooks/inter-repo/` (or stated explicitly that there is no inter-repo impact).
- [ ] If ownership/contracts changed, I updated `docs/runbooks/inter-repo/handoff.md` and `docs/runbooks/inter-repo/integration-log.md`.
- [ ] I validated matching cross-repo updates exist in `runtime-app` when applicable.
- [ ] I did not use `docs/archive/` as active source of truth.
- [ ] I ran required verification commands for touched scope.
